data.content: Implementation complete. Branch worktree-knots-93d9-objective-required pushed to origin (commit a6369df0). Validates top-level objective for execution_plan knots at write time (create, update, type conversion), while keeping legacy {} payloads readable. New --objective CLI flag plumbed through new/update paths. Tests/docs updated. make sanity passed in prior session before push; reruns blocked by tmpfs exhaustion.
